top_signals.title: Cosco to Use New Spanish Port Terminal to Import Cars From China
top_signals.summary: Cosco Shipping Holdings Co. will use a terminal it acquired in eastern Spain mainly for car imports, underlying the country’s growing importance for Chinese automobile manufacturers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Schroders Shuns Treasuries and Bunds in Favor of Italian Debt
top_signals.summary: Asset manager Schroders is buying Italian government bonds, arguing the country has already weathered the budget and political turmoil now rattling investors in other European nations and the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Chile’s Tren de Aragua Probe Revives Bank Secrecy Debate
top_signals.summary: The June arrest of a bank employee accused of ties to Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua criminal organization has reignited debate over Chile’s financial secrecy rules, which are among the strictest in the world.
